summary: The customer hits a login loop after SSO was enabled, so this looks like a fresh auth bug that needs engineering attention right away.

evidence.note: The customer says login works in incognito but loops in the normal browser session.
Auth logs show repeated session refresh attempts.

customer_reply: We found an auth bug and filed it in Linear. Please keep using incognito while our internal team reviews the issue.

bug_report.title: SSO login loop after SSO enablement
bug_report.body: Customer gets bounced back to login after sign-in. Needs review.
